name: MarcoRubio.com
subject: Cyber Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45104997:6HhyOMLN_:m:1:1349778030:A0DA372ABDF1220356D0D5D0F83C7A1B:r)
---
| | | | Peter, You won't want to miss out on the massive Cyber Monday sale we're having to kick off the holiday shopping season, starting **[TODAY.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45104998:6HhyOMLN_:m:1:1349778030:A0DA372ABDF1220356D0D5D0F83C7A1B:r)**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45104998:6HhyOMLN_:m:1:1349778030:A0DA372ABDF1220356D0D5D0F83C7A1B:r)
---
| All weekend long we're offering:
* FREE shipping
* Storewide discounts
* Automatic entry into the _**Nevada debate contest**_ with each purchase
* FREE limited edition sticker with every order, only available Thanksgiving weekend

We're also introducing a number of brand new seasonal and gift items like keychains, knit hats and mugs -- perfect stocking stuffers!
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45104998:6HhyOMLN_:m:1:1349778030:A0DA372ABDF1220356D0D5D0F83C7A1B:r)
---
| This deal only runs from 7:00 AM today until midnight on Monday, so don't wait!
---
| | [**Click here to start shopping** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45104998:6HhyOMLN_:m:1:1349778030:A0DA372ABDF1220356D0D5D0F83C7A1B:r)
---
| As always, everything is made in America. Happy shopping!
Team Marco
---
| Nevada Debate Contest Rules
* Contest ends December 8, 2015.
* Limit one entry per individual
* Make a contribution and also enter
* You can also enter [**here**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45104999:6HhyOMLN_:m:1:1349778030:A0DA372ABDF1220356D0D5D0F83C7A1B:r) without making a contribution.
* See full terms & conditions below.

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, click [**here**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45105000:6HhyOMLN_:m:1:1349778030:A0DA372ABDF1220356D0D5D0F83C7A1B:r). To enter without making a contribution, click [**here**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45104999:6HhyOMLN_:m:1:1349778030:A0DA372ABDF1220356D0D5D0F83C7A1B:r). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on November 18, 2015 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on December 8, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on December 8, 2015. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Las Vegas, Nevada on December 15, 2015; roundtrip airfare for the winner and a guest; hotel accommodations for winner and guest . Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Prize not redeemable for cash. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. The Sponsor is Marco Rubio for President, PO Box 558701, Miami, Florida, 33255.
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Race to the finish line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Last month's 3rd GOP debate proved something
huge: I am the only conservative in this race.
Since that debate, I've continued to take on
the Washington machine and our momentum just keeps building.
That's because conservative policies actually
resonate with the American people. That's because they actually
work.
Since the attacks in Paris I've introduced a
bill to stop dangerous refugees from entering the country, defund
welfare from unscrutinized refugees from jihadist countries, and
a bill that would allow Americans in Washington, D.C. to own guns
as the Second amendment intended.
These are the policies America wants and I
think we both know I'm the only one willing to take on the
Washington establishment to fight for these laws.
I know I can count on liberty-loving
Americans like you, Fellow Conservative, to make sure our message sticks
around in December.
We have to show them we're here to stay.
That's why I'm asking every one of my
supporters to chip in with a contribution to my latest Money
Bomb.
This weekend, make a contribution for liberty
on Black Friday or cyber Monday.
We need to raise $200,000 over the long
weekend to be ready for December's blitz of filing fees,
grassroots mobilization efforts and digital advertising leading
up to the next debate.
Let's show the naysayers we're in this race
to win it.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWaC9BuyNx

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWaC9BuyNx

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Black Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---

Friend --

Did you go into work today? At 4am? What about yesterday -- did you have to work on Thanksgiving instead of spending time with your loved ones?

For too many retail workers, the holiday wasn't much of a break. Instead of being able to enjoy Thanksgiving with their families, workers were up before dawn, opening stores for Black Friday and working long hours for low wages that don't pay the bills.

[**We can and must do better for our nation 's workers. Today, on Black Friday, join me in calling on Congress to take action to improve conditions for working families -- starting with an increase in the minimum wage.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4333650211009200128/-4348486024481996800?ms=20151127&refcode=e20151127&amount=15)

**No one who works full-time should live in poverty. No one who works long hours to put food on the table should go without basic benefits like paid sick leave.**

As millions of Americans head to retail stores today, let's redouble our efforts to ensure that those who worked yesterday and today are being paid fairly for their labor and given every opportunity to succeed.

[**Join me and call on Congress to raise the minimum wage, so that hardworking Americans can support their families.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4333650211009200128/-4348486024481996800?ms=20151127&refcode=e20151127&amount=15)

For too long, partisan bickering has blocked meaningful progress towards securing better conditions for many working Americans. **Together, we can send a message to Washington that it 's time to get serious about this and do the right thing for America's workers.**

A very happy (belated) Thanksgiving to you and your family,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4333650211009200128/-4276428430444068864?refcode=e20151127&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4333650211009200128/-4420543618519924736).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQwODgzNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyNTM4OTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. name: Rand Paul
subject: Real quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Real quick, Fellow Conservative-

Coming into December, this presidential race
is going to narrow dramatically.
Luckily, we're in the top 5 - even if the
media refuses to report that success.
We know the media has been working to block
our message this whole time. And now we know CNN was working
directly with Hillary Clinton to smear me!
But I won't let them drown us out and I know
I can count on liberty-loving Americans like you, Fellow Conservative, to
stand with me.
We need to raise $200,000 over the long
weekend to be ready for December's blitz of filing fees,
grassroots mobilization efforts and digital advertising leading
up to the next debate.
We have to show them we're here to stay.
That's why I'm asking every one of my
supporters to chip in with a contribution to my latest Money
Bomb.
Help me win this thing by chipping in $20.16
to my campaign right away.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWWgVSuy-N

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWWgVSuy-N

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

----Powered by Paramount Communication----

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: URGENT: it's a toss up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| _" THIS RACE IS A TOSS UP" \- The Cook Report_ Friends,

Since today is Black Friday, you're probably getting inundated with emails about sales and savings.

This email is different. I want to talk to you about spending -- _the massive amount of spending that Super PACs are going to do in the lead up to Election Day._

**The Florida Senate race is shaping up to be one of the most expensive races in 2016.** It's common knowledge that majority control of the Senate will very likely rest on its outcome. If we win, Democrats can take back the Senate.

**And right now it 's a toss up.**

[**I need your help to prepare for the fight ahead. We MUST hit our November fundraising goal of $50,000 if we want to stay competitive. Can you contribute $5 today?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21cb/738133e4/3a278334/7f8345a9/3510849180/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151127?refcode=pme151127_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

I've been an avid fisherman for many years, and one of the things I've grown accustomed to is rising early. If you want a chance at a good catch, you have to be out there and ready to cast a line before sunrise.

If we want to win next November and turn the Senate blue, we have to start early -- before the Koch brothers and Karl Rove rain down cash to help their Republican allies.

The big catch here is winning Florida and winning the Senate for Democrats. I need you to help us get ready.

[**This is our moment to rise early and get out ahead of the competition. We 're just $11,000 shy of our November goal, and Democrats everywhere are counting on us. Help us by giving what you can right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21cb/738133e4/3a278334/7f8345a9/3510849180/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151127?refcode=pme151127_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Good luck with Black Friday shopping,

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21cb/738133e4/3a278334/7f8345aa/3510849180/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21cb/738133e4/3a278334/7f8345ab/3510849180/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21cb/738133e4/3a278334/7f8345a4/3510849180/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Let’s say Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_friday&n=1)
---
Friend --

Today, many people will begin wishing me Happy Holidays, but I will choose to say ‘Merry Christmas.’ Christmas is a special time to spread the joy of Christ’s birth. It’s not just a holiday for me. It was a new beginning for us all.

So, in the midst of the shopping, preparations, campaigning and family gatherings, I want to remember the real reason we are celebrating.

Friend, will you pledge to join me in choosing to say ‘Merry Christmas’ not Happy Holidays?

[ **I choose to say Merry Christmas** ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/merry_christmas?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_friday&n=2)
God Bless!

Rick

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum%3Fsc%3Dblack-friday&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_friday&n=3)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_friday&n=4) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_friday&n=5) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_friday&n=6), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_friday&n=7), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_friday&n=8).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_friday&n=9)

body:

Hillary for America

name: Becky Bond, Bernie 2016
subject: A better idea for what to do today
body:
#
Dear Friend,
Black Friday is one of the biggest shopping days of the year. A lot of corporations (and even candidates) encourage people to start shopping last night and early today.
**We have a better idea for what you can do today: Sign up to volunteer for Bernie Sanders.**
Bernie supporters are planning volunteer actions for Black Friday weekend. From calling voters in the early voting states to registering people to vote outside of Walmart, Bernie supporters like you are building the political revolution we need to address economic inequality in our country.
All they need is for you to show up and join them.
**What:** MoCo4Bernie Meeting and Phonebanking [Now at 7 pm] in Rockville
**Where:** Dolly Madison Room, Americana Centre
4 Monroe Place
Rockville, MD 20850
**When:** Tuesday, December 1st
7:00 pm EST
**[RSVP to Attend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vqsj)**
[**Get more info about this event »**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vqsj)
**Or[check our map](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2664/43f17890/4e108908/621bd1be/1050996185/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&eventtype=R&eventtype=CW&eventtype=E&eventtype=D&eventtype=B&daterange=all-events&sort=time") to find more events near you.**
Bernie Sanders believes that no full-time worker should live in poverty, and he supports raising the current federal minimum wage to a living wage.
Companies like Walmart pay poverty wages that force the government to subsidize corporate profits by providing many of their workers with the public programs they need to survive -- like food stamps, Medicaid and subsidized housing.
**The big corporations that are betting on the billionaire-backed candidates in this race will rake in big profits over the Thanksgiving holiday. We have an idea for how to win against them: volunteer to help build the political revolution.**
Growing this movement in all 50 states is what it's going to take to build the political revolution. Now it's time to do your part by coming out for Bernie.
**[Find volunteer events near you and sign up to help Bernie win the presidency](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2664/43f17890/4e108908/621bd1be/1050996185/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&eventtype=R&eventtype=CW&eventtype=E&eventtype=D&eventtype=B&daterange=all-events&sort=time")**.
Thanks for all you do. It's an honor to be with you in this movement.
Becky Bond
Bernie 2016
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2664/43f17890/4e108908/621bd1bf/1050996185/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em151127-bf-vol")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2664/43f17890/4e108908/621bd1bc/1050996185/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2664/43f17890/4e108908/621bd1bd/1050996185/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2664/43f17890/4e108908/621bd1ba/1050996185/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2664/43f17890/4e108908/621bd1bb/1050996185/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
